source: https://www.navy.com/sitemap.xml — the Navy's published career pages (141 careers it actively recruits into).
method: Normalised name match plus an explicit alias table for ratings whose formal name differs from the Navy's marketing slug (SO=navy-seal, SB=special-warfare-combat-crewman, PR=aviation-survival-equipmentman, the nuclear field). FAIL CLOSED on anything unmatched.
